entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
"Check my answer before giving yours."
"Debate ambition with Steve Jobs"
"Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg"
"Debate justice with Batman"
"Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Eman bertsio zailago bat nik saiatu ondoren."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
"Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Erabili nire azterketako, proiektuko edo eguneroko bizitzako adibideak."

entries.source: AI prompts
Argument
Ask for a tiny first task.
Debate with a personality prompts and study loop
entries.value: Debate with a personality promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
For Debate with a personality, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: Debate with a personality-rako praktika-ziklo erabilgarria hau da:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Modu honetarako, lana sinplea da: praktikatu argudioa aukeratutako gai bati buruz pertsonaia publiko edo fikziozko batekin eztabaidatuz.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Prompt onek normalean hiru gauza dituzte: gaia, zure egungo maila eta nahi duzun laguntza mota. Ez duzu formulazio perfekturik behar. Saioa hasteko adina testuinguru besterik ez duzu behar.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: Erantzuna zabalegia iruditzen bazaizu, estutu. Eskatu adibide bat, uste oker bat, egiaztapen-galdera bat edo hurrengo urrats bat. Errazegia bada, eskatu erronka bat. Zaila bada, eskatu dagoeneko dakizunetik zubi bat.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Debate with a personality on inspir.
entries.value: inspir-en Debate with a personality erabiliz ikaskuntza-emaitza erabilgarriak lortzeko prompt ideiak eta ikasketa-ziklo errepikagarria.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI erantzun bat irakurtzea ez da ikastea bera. Lehen erantzunaren ondoren, eskatu moduari ideiarekin zerbait eginarazteko.

entries.source: Related learning paths
Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Eskatu feedbacka ziurra sentitu ez den zatiari buruz.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
Start with one clear request
State the goal in one sentence.
study skills
That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: Azken laburpen hori garrantzitsua da. Ideia berriro azaltzen duzunean, zer den sendoa eta zer dagoen oraindik AIari mailegatuta erakusten duzu.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Ikaskuntza-saio onenak moldagarriak dira. Debateak estilo publikoa eta mundu-ikuspegia erabiltzen ditu sinesmen pribatuak ezagutzen dituela itxuratu gabe.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Debate with a personality is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Debate with a personality-tik balioa lortzeko modurik azkarrena AIari ikaskuntza-lan bat ematea da, ez gai bat bakarrik. Gai batek zer interesatzen zaizun esaten du. Ikaskuntza-lan batek zer laguntza mota behar duzun esaten du.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Gero gehitu saioa pertsonalago egiten duen muga bat:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
Turn the mode into practice

Use Debate with a personality when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Talk to a historical person. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Erabili Debate with a personality lanerako modu egokia denean. Erlazionatutako bide bat nahi baduzu, probatu Talk to a historical person. AI ikaskuntza-bloga ere araka dezakezu ikasketa-metodoak, ikaskuntza sokratikoa, ikasketa-txartelak, roleplaya eta gogoratze aktiboa ikusteko.
